protected_region: 10 mK sample stage and NV sensing volume
source_region: 4 K shield interior and warm beamline
primary_risk_reduced: Direct thermal-radiation load from 4 K and warmer onto the 10 mK stage during Mode D
validation_method: Radiometric heat-load measurement at sample stage with shutter closed vs open
notes: Existing canonical element. Shutter must close cleanly with no leakage path; load must be measured below Mode D budget.

source_region: 4 K shell and warm-line entry points
primary_risk_reduced: Line-of-sight blackbody radiation from warmer stages
notes: Existing canonical element. Labyrinth path geometry reduces direct line-of-sight; effectiveness depends on emissivity and contamination.

source_region: Mode B growth zone and warm optical paths
primary_risk_reduced: Optical-path and process-region radiation/contamination ingress into Mode D
validation_method: Coordinated open/close cycle test with heat-load and contamination instrumentation
notes: Existing canonical element. Stack effectiveness only meaningful when all three shutters are characterized and interlocked.

protected_region: 10 mK sample stage and NV volume
primary_risk_reduced: RF pickup, microwave leakage, blackbody leakage through wiring, parasitic pW/nW heating, false NV dephasing sources
validation_method: Sample-stage heat-load with can closed vs open; RF noise floor at NV measurement frequencies; NV ODMR/Ramsey baseline inside vs outside can
notes: Filters must terminate into or inside the enclosure. Thermal anchor to mixing chamber required. NOT_INSTALLED.

shield_name: staged IR/high-frequency coax and microwave filtering
source_region: room-temperature signal generators and 4 K stage
primary_risk_reduced: High-frequency photon leakage and blackbody/RF heat load entering Mode D via signal lines
thermal_anchor_stage: each stage: 300 K / 50 K / 4 K / 1 K / 100 mK / 10 mK
validation_method: Per-stage thermometry on filter bodies; sample-stage heat load; broadband transmission measurement
notes: Stages must include IR/high-frequency filters, not only microwave attenuators. Thermal anchoring at every stage required. NOT_INSTALLED.

source_region: room-temperature optical access and warm windows
primary_risk_reduced: Direct room-T line of sight, thermal radiation, NV-readout scatter, fs-laser scatter memory, IR leakage
validation_method: Optical-power measurement at each stage; line-of-sight audit; sample-stage heat-load measurement
notes: Aperture chain: room-T access -> 50 K/4 K -> 1 K/100 mK -> cold beam dump -> sample. NOT_INSTALLED.

source_region: stray optical power from NV readout and fs-laser scatter
primary_risk_reduced: Stray optical power absorbed before it reaches the mK region
thermal_anchor_stage: 4 K or 1 K (preferred); 100 mK only if heat budget allows
validation_method: Beam-dump absorbed-power measurement at each stage; sample-stage cumulative heating
notes: Place at higher-capacity stages; large absorptive loads must not be on the 10 mK stage unless budget proves it. NOT_INSTALLED.

primary_risk_reduced: Mode B chemical memory, hydrocarbon migration, residual precursor on the sensing side of the shutter stack
validation_method: Witness-coupon and RGA before/after Mode B exposure; QCM mass tracking
notes: Two-zone concept: dirty process shutter -> sacrificial cryopanel/cold trap -> clean sensing shutter. NOT_INSTALLED.

protected_region: Mode D sensing region and 10 mK volume
primary_risk_reduced: Residual precursor, hydrocarbons, water, methane fragments, generic process fragments
validation_method: RGA species-resolved residual measurement; QCM mass tracking; witness-coupon analysis; saturation/regeneration cycle test
notes: Saturation and regeneration are explicit risks. NOT_INSTALLED.

source_region: external low-frequency magnetic environment and lab background
primary_risk_reduced: External magnetic noise that degrades NV ODMR/Ramsey/T2*
thermal_anchor_stage: outer at 300 K; cryogenic shield at 4 K; near-sample shield at mK if used
validation_method: Magnetometer field-map with shield in/out; NV ODMR/Ramsey baseline comparison; NV bias-field stability check
notes: Layered: outer high-permeability -> cryogenic high-permeability -> optional near-sample. Must preserve calibrated NV bias-field geometry. NOT_INSTALLED.

primary_risk_reduced: Time-varying field at low frequency; trade-off against trapped flux, cooldown-history dependence, field distortion, bias-coil incompatibility, eddy-current heating
validation_method: Controlled-field cooldown; field map before/after; NV ODMR baseline before/after; trapped-flux assessment
notes: Optional only. Multiple specific tests required before adoption. NOT_INSTALLED.

protected_region: 10 mK sample stage and NV sensing volume
primary_risk_reduced: Room-temperature and 4 K microwave / blackbody radiation into the sensing volume
validation_method: Sample-stage heat-load measurement; NV dephasing budget vs filter chain; measured filter-body temperatures
notes: Depends on SHIELD-004 + SHIELD-005 + attenuator chain and thermal anchoring. Blocked until installation and measurement.
